steps.title: Mark separate possession
steps.content: The sentence discusses chorus-to-verse ratios for two genres, rock and rap. The phrase each genre's data shows that each genre has its own ratio trend, so each singular genre name should be possessive.

steps.title: Keep both genre names singular
steps.content: Choice A pluralizes both genre names and shows no possession. Choice C mixes a plural form with one possessive. Choice D marks only joint possession, implying one shared ratio. The sentence needs separate singular possessives for rock and rap. The answer is B.
